content:
6️⃣ Cross-Path Opportunities & Course Flexibility

Students can experiment outside their chosen path once per semester via:
1. Path Swap Week (Week 7 or 8) – Try another path’s workload for one week.
2. Wild Card Assignment – Optional “crossover” task (e.g., a Mastery Exam student can join a discussion for extra credit.)

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages students to experiment with different learning styles.
• Prevents students from feeling trapped in their path.

7️⃣ Final Lock-In: Remaining Questions Answered

1. Should students be allowed to pitch Mastery Exam questions?
✔ Yes, via the Complaint Box (“Prayers to an Unhearing God”).

2. Should students have a Final Reflection Letter?
✔ Yes, structured via Concrete, Abstract, Connecting, Exploratory.
